transcript: this is the world's top-ranked beach for multiple reasons on source d'argent in seychelles is the most beautiful island you've ever seen over the years this beach has attracted an insane amount of filmmakers the main reasons are because of the rare coco de mer palm trees which produce the largest seeds in the world and the unforgettable granite boulders make sure not to destroy anything if you visit because there are major conservation efforts
